description: Puerto Rican criminal organization based in Bayamón, founded in 1995 by José López Rosario. It unified drug dealers under one umbrella, becoming the most powerful drug trafficking organization in Puerto Rico by 2009. Involved in trafficking heroin, cocaine, marijuana, crack, Xanax, and Percocet. Declined after mass arrests in 2009-2010.

country_links.evidence_quote: ONU helped transport shipments from Colombia, Puerto Rico, Venezuela and other Latin American countries to the United States.
country_links.context: ONU helped transport shipments from Colombia to the United States.
